spec.description: Troubleshooting dashboard for VictoriaMetrics cluster benchmarks. All rows collapsed; open the relevant section.

spec.title: vmagent remote write latency p50/p99
spec.description: Remote write request latency quantiles by pod and URL.

spec.title: vmauth user request latency p50/p99
spec.description: User request latency quantiles by pod and username.

spec.expr: max(vmauth_user_request_duration_seconds{job=~"$job_auth", pod=~"$pod", quantile=~"(0.5|0.99)", $filter} or vmauth_unauthorized_user_request_duration_seconds{job=~"$job_auth", pod=~"$pod", quantile=~"(0.5|0.99)", $filter}) by (pod, username, quantile) > 0

spec.title: vmagent CPU available ratio
spec.description: Process CPU usage divided by VM available CPU cores. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=at/over available CPU.

spec.title: vmauth CPU available ratio
spec.description: Process CPU usage divided by VM available CPU cores. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=at/over available CPU.

spec.title: vmagent memory available ratio
spec.description: Process RSS divided by VM available memory. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=OOM risk.

spec.title: vmauth memory available ratio
spec.description: Process RSS divided by VM available memory. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=OOM risk.

spec.title: vmagent process PSI
spec.description: Process pressure stall information. Any sustained non-zero value means CPU, I/O, or memory pressure inside process cgroup.

spec.title: vmauth process PSI
spec.description: Process pressure stall information. Any sustained non-zero value means CPU, I/O, or memory pressure inside process cgroup.

spec.title: -> vmagent
spec.description: Bytes received and written by vmagent TCP listeners.

spec.title: -> vmauth
spec.description: Bytes received and written by vmauth TCP listeners.

spec.title: vmagent listener conns
spec.description: Open and idle TCP listener connections for vmagent.

spec.title: vmauth listener conns
spec.description: Open and idle TCP listener connections for vmauth.

spec.title: Version history
spec.description: Component version presence over time, shown as pod counts per version.

spec.expr:
WITH (
  cur = label_move(
    last_over_time(
      sum(flag{is_set="true", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", $filter})
      by (job, instance, name, value)[1m]
    ),
    "value", "to"
  ),
  prev = label_move(
    last_over_time(
      sum(flag{is_set="true", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", $filter})
      by (job, instance, name, value)[1m] offset 5m
    ),
    "value", "was"
  ),
  diff = cur * on(job, instance, name) group_left(was) prev
)
diff ifnot labels_equal(diff, "was", "to")

WITH (
  cur = label_move(
    last_over_time(
      sum(flag{is_set="true", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", $filter})
      by (job, instance, name, value)[1m]
    ),
    "value", "to"
  ),
  prev = label_move(
    last_over_time(
      sum(flag{is_set="true", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", $filter})
      by (job, instance, name, value)[1m] offset 10m
    ),
    "value", "was"
  ),
  old_inst = present_over_time(
    sum(flag{is_set="true", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", $filter})
    by (job, instance)[5m] offset 10m
  ),
  joined = cur * on(job, instance, name) group_left(was) prev,
  changed = joined ifnot labels_equal(joined, "was", "to"),
  new_flag = label_set(
    (
      cur ifnot on(job, instance, name) prev
    ) if on(job, instance) old_inst,
    "was", "absent"
  )
)
changed or new_flag

spec.title: Scrape targets up
spec.description: 1=reachable, 0=scrape failing. Gaps or zeros = monitoring blind spot.

spec.title: vmselect: concurrent queries
spec.description: Active select goroutines vs capacity.

spec.title: vminsert → vmstorage dialer conns
spec.description: Active TCP connections from each vminsert pod to each vmstorage backend (vm_tcpdialer_conns, grouped by addr). Uneven distribution = load-balancing issue.

spec.title: vmselect → vmstorage dialer conns
spec.description: Active TCP connections from each vmselect pod to each vmstorage backend (vm_tcpdialer_conns, grouped by addr). Idle conns are kept-alive pool.

spec.title: CPU throttle ratio
spec.description: Fraction of CPU scheduling periods throttled (>0.25 = significant throttling).

spec.title: Non-running VM pods
spec.description: Any pod not in Running/Succeeded phase. 1=pod stuck in that phase.

spec.title: -> vminsert
spec.description: Bytes/s received (from clients) and sent (to clients) by vminsert TCP listener.

spec.title: vmselect ->
spec.description: Bytes/s received and sent by vmselect TCP listener.

spec.title: vmstorage -> vmselect
spec.description: Bytes/s received from vminsert/vmselect and sent back by vmstorage listener.

spec.title: vminsert -> vmstorage
spec.description: Bytes/s written (push to vmstorage) and read (acks) by vminsert TCP dialer.

spec.title: vminsert process PSI
spec.description: Process-level PSI for vminsert. CPU/IO/memory waiting = some stall; stalled = full stall where available. High values indicate resource pressure inside the component process.

spec.title: vmselect process PSI
spec.description: Process-level PSI for vmselect. CPU/IO/memory waiting = some stall; stalled = full stall where available. High values indicate resource pressure inside the component process.

spec.title: Pod restarts
spec.description: Container restart increase over 5m. Any spike = crash/OOMKilled.

spec.title: vmstorage process PSI
spec.description: Process-level PSI for vmstorage. CPU/IO/memory waiting = some stall; stalled = full stall where available. High values indicate resource pressure inside the component process.

spec.title: vminsert CPU available ratio
spec.description: Process CPU usage divided by VM available CPU cores. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=at/over available CPU.

spec.title: vmselect CPU available ratio
spec.description: Process CPU usage divided by VM available CPU cores. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=at/over available CPU.

spec.title: vmstorage CPU available ratio
spec.description: Process CPU usage divided by VM available CPU cores. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=at/over available CPU.

spec.title: vminsert memory available ratio
spec.description: Process RSS divided by VM available memory. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=OOM risk.

spec.title: vmselect memory available ratio
spec.description: Process RSS divided by VM available memory. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=OOM risk.

spec.title: vmstorage memory available ratio
spec.description: Process RSS divided by VM available memory. 0.8=orange, 0.9=red, 1.0=OOM risk.

spec.title: OOM events
spec.description: cgroup OOM events + node OOM kills. Any non-zero = memory pressure causing kills.

spec.title: vminsert HTTP latency p50/p99
spec.description: HTTP insert request duration on vminsert. High p99 = slow write path.

spec.title: vmselect HTTP latency p50/p99
spec.description: HTTP query request duration on vmselect.

spec.title: vmstorage avg I/O duration
spec.description: Average filestream write and read latency on vmstorage. Spikes = disk saturation.

spec.title: HTTP error rate
spec.description: Failed HTTP requests across all VM components. Any non-zero = client-visible errors.

spec.title: vminsert: concurrent inserts
spec.description: Active insert goroutines vs capacity. Near-capacity = insert queue pressure.

spec.title: VMCluster troubleshooting
